response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud infrastructure, plus direct exposure to AI-agent tooling and testing frameworks like Vitest — all core to the role. His track record of building scalable systems, contributing to open-source platforms, and leading technical initiatives demonstrates exceptional alignment with the job’s requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling contributions
Strong DevOps and testing culture with Docker, CI/CD, and Vitest/Jest exposure
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin/Java in recent roles
German language proficiency is only basic, may impact local collaboration
Some older technologies (e.g., DLang, Ember) may suggest occasional divergence from modern mainstream stacks
